# scene

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/scene`

Package scene declares GOLC's Scene/Layer domain model (CONTEXT
SCEN-01/SCEN-04/SCEN-05): a Scene loops for a configured number of
musical bars against the global BPM and combines four independently
enabled, independently selectable layers -- base-look, color-theme,
chase, motion -- resolved by a fixed priority order. Scene's identity,
construction, rename, and unique-name shape mirror internal/pool's own
pattern verbatim (UUIDv7 minted once, never derived from or re-minted by
Name), and its single-active-scene invariant mirrors
internal/deployment's ValidateSingleActive/Activate exactly.
